_doc: Feature flags for the Bet The Farm Hub. Hub fetches this file at init
and exposes it on window.BTF_FEATURE_FLAGS. The GitHub Actions logger
(scripts/log_picks.py) sees the same state via the live hub it loads,
so a single file controls both the UI and what gets graded.
To toggle a flag: edit this file, commit, push. Next workflow run picks
it up automatically; refresh the live hub to see UI changes.
nba_playoff_enabled_doc: Default false. NBA model has been -25% ROI during 2026 playoffs
(5-8 record on May 1–8 sample). The recency factor (F11) trusts hot
regular-season teams that don't translate to series-format playoffs —
e.g. Cavaliers picked 4x against Pistons → all 4 lost by ~10pts.
- Show NBA picks in the live hub Hot Bets tab during May/June
- Log them in data/picks/{date}.json so they get graded
- Display a 🏀⚠️ warning on each NBA pick card
Reset to false (or simply let June end) to re-enable suppression.
